summary: REQ-9/10/11 are largely implemented: WeeklySpendBarChart bar fill changed to chart-2; app renamed to “Monet Tracker” in AppShell, Settings About text, and index.html title; UI polish applied across AppShell/nav, top-level screens, and global styling. One notable addition in AppShell appears unrelated to the request (new footer attribution/UTM logic).

hallucinated_features.description: Added/changed footer attribution with external link to caffeine.ai (including UTM tracking based on hostname) and a Heart icon.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not ask to add or change product attribution/marketing links or tracking parameters; only rename, chart color token change, and general UI polish were requested.
